transcript: Speaker A (AI): तुझं नाव काय आहे [What is your name?] Speaker B (Human): My name is Rahul. Speaker A: तुझं वय काय आहे [What is your age?] Speaker B: I have 22. Speaker A: I have 22 नाही, I am 22 yrs old म्हणतात. [Not 'I have 22', they say 'I am 22 yrs old'.] Speaker B: Okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker A: तू कुठला आहेस [Where are you from?] Speaker B: I am Maharashtra. Speaker A: I am Maharashtra नाही, I am from Maharashtra. [Not 'I am Maharashtra', 'I am from Maharashtra'.] Speaker B: मला English नीट येत नाही. [I don't know English well.] Speaker A: AI teachers ट्राय केलं आहे का? नॉर्मल क्लासेस पेक्षा ७ पट स्वस्त आहे. [Have you tried AI teachers? It is 7 times cheaper than normal classes.] Speaker B: वेळ मिळत नाही. [I don't get time.] Speaker A: रोज १५-२० मिनिटांची प्रॅक्टिस पुरेशी आहे. [Daily 15-20 minutes of practice is enough.] Speaker B: कसं जॉईन करू? [How to join?] Speaker A: इन्स्टॉल करा. [Install it.] Speaker C: आत्ताच MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड करा. [Download the MySivi app now.]
on_screen_text: मला English येत नाही [I don't know English] | तुझं नाव काय आहे [What is your name?] | I am 22 yrs old | I am from Maharashtra | 7X CHEAPER | रोज फक्त 15-20 मिनिटांची practice [Daily just 15-20 minutes of practice] | MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A young man with 'I don't know English' written on his back interacts with an AI robot on a screen that corrects his basic English grammar mistakes. The robot introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice solution to build confidence. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
